violations.text: Cold- and/or hot-holding units (2-door freezer) were observed in poor repair in the kitchen. PIC stated the freezer is only used for ice packs and water, as it does not keep cold consistently. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the vegetable/waffle milk case have an accumulation frost. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Milk being placed on cold line was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was placed in freezer to rapidly chill. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
Freezer in 3 bay sink area was not in good repair, not staying on. Sodexo employee arrived during inspection to remove/replace. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Dozens of old tires observed piled in the back of the parking lot. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Principal was informed during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of 2 portable fans have an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Reach-in freezer located near the 3-bay sink area was not in good repair. Per PIC, the unit does not maintain proper temperature. Unit was not in operation during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. PIC to order from main kitchen, Inspector provided thermo labels during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the dish washing area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
